schema.name: BitSightDiligenceStatistics_CL
schema.description: The BitSightDiligenceStatistics table merges diligence statistics (StatType='Diligence') and observations statistics (StatType='Observations') per risk vector for each portfolio company from the BitSight API ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: stat_type
columns.description: Source of the record: 'Diligence' for diligence statistics, 'Observations' for observations statistics.

columns.name: risk_vector
columns.description: The risk vector slug (dict key -- not populated by CCF JSONPath; always null).

columns.name: unknown
columns.description: [Diligence] Count of findings with unknown severity.

columns.name: observation_count
columns.description: [Observations] Total number of observations for this risk vector.

columns.name: average_duration_days
columns.description: [Observations] Average duration in days for observations.

columns.name: risk_vector_label
columns.description: Human-readable name of the risk vector (API field: name).

columns.name: grade
columns.description: Letter grade for this risk vector.

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Numeric score for this risk vector.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
